title: Public Sector Equality Duty report 2023/24
body: "In carrying out our functions, GIAA is required to have due regard to and achieve the objectives set out under this act to:   eliminate discrimination, harassment, victimisation and any other conduct that is prohibited by or under the Equality Act 2010 advance equality of opportunity between persons who share a relevant protected characteristic and persons who do not share it foster good relations between persons who share a relevant protected characteristic and persons who do not share it   This report provides aggregated information relating to our employees and a benchmark that enables us to measure progress and identify priority areas for further research and action. It shows how we carry out our statutory duty to promote and monitor equalities. "
